---
name: docs-base-maintenance
description: Use after every feature, fix, migration, security change, data change, setup change, API change, architecture change, or operational change.
---

# Docs Base Maintenance

## When To Use

Use whenever implementation changes behavior, setup, operations, security, data flow, API contracts, or troubleshooting.

## Update

- `.github/docs/project-docs-base.md`
- `.github/docs/project-changelog.md`
- `.github/docs/feature-delivery-log.md`
- Any relevant architecture, API, runbook, or standards docs

## Record

- What changed
- Why it changed
- Verification evidence
- Security/privacy/data impact
- Rollback notes
- Residual risk
- Follow-ups
